'''ralasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaggregation|coaggregation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaggregation|coaggregation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ralasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rælæsæth|rælæsæth]] || [[word:rælæsæj|rælæsæj]] || [[word:rælæsæsh|rælæsæsh]] || [[word:rælæsæ|rælæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralalasath|ralalasath]] || [[word:ralalasaj|ralalasaj]] || [[word:ralalasash|ralalasash]] || [[word:ralalasa|ralalasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralasath|ralasath]] || [[word:ralasaj|ralasaj]] || [[word:ralasash|ralasash]] || [[word:ralasa|ralasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralafsath|ralafsath]] || [[word:ralafsaj|ralafsaj]] || [[word:ralafsash|ralafsash]] || [[word:ralafsaf|ralafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ralasatha|ralasatha]] || [[word:ralasaja|ralasaja]] || [[word:ralasasha|ralasasha]] || [[word:ralasaka|ralasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ralasath|ralasath]] || [[word:ralasaj|ralasaj]] || [[word:ralasash|ralasash]] || [[word:ralasa|ralasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ralasathal|ralasathal]] || [[word:ralasajal|ralasajal]] || [[word:ralasashal|ralasashal]] || [[word:ralasakal|ralasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ralasathatha|ralasathatha]] || [[word:ralasajaja|ralasajaja]] || [[word:ralasashasha|ralasashasha]] || [[word:ralasaka|ralasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ralasathan|ralasathan]] || [[word:ralasajan|ralasajan]] || [[word:ralasashan|ralasashan]] || [[word:ralasakan|ralasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ralasathaoro|ralasathaoro]] || [[word:ralasajaoro|ralasajaoro]] || [[word:ralasashaoro|ralasashaoro]] || [[word:ralasakaoro|ralasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
